remaining_tasks.name: Add startup, fetch-issues, build-tracker commands to tracker-tools.cjs
Revise SKILL.md router to use startup command
Revise save-issues.md to use startup data

decisions.decision: Full data layer script (parse, compile, update, validate)
decisions.rationale: Offload all deterministic work to Node script, agent only orchestrates

decisions.decision: Temp dir with auto-cleanup for subagent results
decisions.rationale: Results on disk, not in context memory — prevents forgetting the overview

decisions.decision: Full XML rewrite for all workflows
decisions.rationale: Named steps with acceptance criteria and enforcement language

decisions.decision: All workflows get revised (check-in, save, setup)

decisions.rationale: startup, fetch-issues, build-tracker added to existing parse-tracker, compile-report, update-tracker, init-temp, validate
Split duty: script compiles report, agent refs stay for tracker-schema and gh-cli-patterns

decisions.decision: Single startup command replaces 3 separate init calls
decisions.rationale: Auth + username + tracker parse + discovery all in one call

decisions.decision: fetch-issues does all gh API calls in script
decisions.rationale: Deterministic, parallel, no LLM needed for API fetching
Reduces 32 agents to ~7, each with pre-fetched data

decisions.decision: GOOD vs BAD quality examples in agent prompts
decisions.rationale: v3 tracker comparison showed shallow output — concrete examples prevent generic language

next_action: Execute the 6-task plan in 260402-mkl-PLAN.md. Spawn gsd-executor with the plan. All tasks are not_started.
context_notes: Initial implementation was done earlier in this session (script + workflow rewrite, committed as ee11a8c). Then extensive testing produced 3 rounds of feedback. All feedback was captured in the plan update (d840034). The plan is ready to execute — user verified it and said 'go' but we paused before spawning the executor. The prior implementation (ee11a8c) will be overwritten by the plan execution since all the same files are being revised.
